creator: fbugs@s403.33mail.com
text:
Created attachment 160541
Patch for usbdevs and usb_quirk.ca

I would like someone to kindly add the quirk for support of the Linksys USB3GIGV1 USB Ethernet adapter.  The USB Ethernet adapter works fine with the if_cdce module (tested on amd64 and armv6).

Attached are patches for usbdevs and usb_quirk.c

Thanks!
